title: How do UFOs operate? Manipulating Spacetime Metrics
summary: This interview discusses the theoretical physics behind UFO propulsion, specifically focusing on the manipulation of spacetime metrics and gravity as a potential mechanism for how UFOs operate. The conversation references work done at AATIP examining these mathematical frameworks.

key_claims.claim: Hal Puthoff believes UFOs may move by manipulating spacetime metric through promoting gravity from a constant to a field variable
The theory of manipulating spacetime metrics for propulsion was examined at AATIP
Mathematical formulas suggest that manipulating spacetime metrics is the fundamental theory behind UFO propulsion, not just a possibility
